title: Messaging.
tagline: People & agents as one team, to achieve business outcomes.
keyMessage: Multiply organization impact from AI, beyond just individual's output.
secondaryMessages: Collaborate people & agents in a shared workspace.
Bring your own agents to monday, or access monday directly from other AI tools.
Agents do even more work for you than before — HTML, decks, collaborative.

differentiators.title: AI accessibility
differentiators.positioning: From complex AI capabilities to simple products anyone can use.
differentiators.description: monday turns those capabilities into simple products built into real work, so anyone can put advanced AI to use — no technical skill required.

differentiators.title: Trust
differentiators.positioning: Control that holds as people and agents multiply.
differentiators.description: Bring it into one system with clear identities and boundaries — for every human and agent — so admins keep control even as work scales.

writingGuidelines: It's part of the AI Work Platform — not separated. Always position it as part of the whole.
You can (and should) spotlight specific features — just make sure to connect them to the wider story.
For technical personas, use technical language: MCP, APIs, agents, workflows.
Use concrete examples. Real customer scenarios beat abstract claims.

sayDontSay.say: External agents · Claude agents · Cursor agents
